name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in claude-devkit

labels: bug

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Tool affected
- [ ] `ai-review`
- [ ] `project-brief`
- [ ] `devlog-hook`
- [ ] `claude-status`
- [ ] Install script

## Steps to reproduce
1. ...
2. ...

## Expected behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error output if any.

## Environment
- OS: (e.g., macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Shell: (e.g., zsh 5.9, bash 5.2)
- Claude Code version: (`claude --version`)
- claude-devkit version: (`git -C ~/.claude-devkit log -1 --format="%h %s"`)
